title: Street Fighter 6/Version/1.08 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 1.08 Game Version 1.08 date December 2, 2024 Summary Minor balance changes for all characters. Links Patch Notes Universal Changes Jump Cancels Canceling a character's prejump frames into a special move can no longer be used to escape normal Throws as a defensive option Active frames of a normal Throw are extended when they make contact with throw invuln prejump frames, ensuring a jump canceled special will be thrown immediately This is especially impactful for Zangief and Lily, who have a longer prejump time that could be canceled into a command throw Sweeps Several 2HK sweeps has their pushback or recovery adjusted to ensure that opponents can consistently punish them on block Some perfectly spaced sweeps may still be safe in specific matchups when spaced perfectly Applied to Akuma, Cammy, Ken, Jamie, and M. Bison Perfect Parry vs. Multi-hit Attacks After a Perfect Parry, it is no longer possible to cancel the later hits of an attack This was already true on block, but now applies on hit and armor as well This change allows characters to punish more attacks with Drive Impact, such as M. Bison's OD Psycho Crusher and Lily's Windclad OD Condor Spire Video example of how the cancel used to work Note: this change was temporarily reverted due to a bug, but was re-applied in Version 1.09 Overdrive Specials The visual effects of OD moves now take priority over Burnout recovery effects when performed immediately after Burnout ends Super Armor Fixed issue where an attack could be absorbed by armor even when connecting with a non-armored hurtbox, if it connected during the hitstop of another attack that was armor absorbed Hypothetical example: Marisa absorbs a projectile with Gladius (upper-body armor), then a 2MK connects immediately afterward during the armor hitstop, leading to it being absorbed when it should go under the armor hurtbox Collision Box Behavior Fixed issue where cornered characters would shift a greater distance when switching sides with an airborne opponent Key Character Changes A.K.I. 5HP Drive Gain increased 2000 → 3000 HP Serpent Lash (236HP) Juggle Increase value when triggering Toxic Blossom decreased 5 → 2 Gives more lenient combo routes when comboing into 236HP on a poisoned opponent HK Cruel Fate (214HK) Increased KD Advantage when the final hit connects on an airborne opponent Akuma Back Walk Speed reduced 0.036 → 0.035 Assist Combo 2 Fixed issue where buffering attacks after Adamant Flame would result in simple-input damage scaling 2MK Can now cancel to Drive Impact 2f earlier (on the first active frame) 2HK Pushback on block reduced for both Akuma and the opponent; easier for many characters to punish Resso Snap Kick (6MK) Whiff recovery increased 18 → 19 and extended the whiff hurtbox Tenmaku Blade Kick (j.2MK) Drive Gain increased 2000 → 3000 Gou Hadoken (236P/PP) Forward hurtbox extended from the 3rd active frame onward OD Gou Shoryuken (623PP) Total damage decreased 1900 → 1700 OD Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku (214KK) KD Advantage increased +46 → +47 LK Demon Raid (236LK) Movement speed after crossing over the opponent increased 0.02 → 0.04 Now matches the movement speed of the other strengths Demon Swoop (236K/KK~[2]) 5f extra landing recovery when crossing over opponent Blanka 2HP Drive Gain increased 3000 → 4000 Double Knee Bombs (6MK) Foot hurtbox raised upwards on frame 9 onward, making it a more effective low crush 1st hit now causes free juggle state vs. airborne, allowing both hits to connect Also causes shorter blowback time and distance for both 1st and 2nd hits on airborne opponents Fixed issue where Blanka would get pushed back when the 2nd hit connected on a cornered airborne opponent Wild Nail (6HP) KD Advantage increased by 2 frames on grounded hit (+18 → +20) and by 5 frames on airborne hit Ensures Blanka is always plus after a Forward Dash; no change to Punish Counter version 1-3) Extends a wider combo-only hitbox on active frames 3-4 Cannon Strike (j.214K) Drive Gain increased 1000 → 2500 OD Cannon Strike (j.214KK) When input on the way up, frame advantage is now fixed items.html:
Jump Cancels
  • Canceling a character's prejump frames into a special move can no longer be used to escape normal Throws as a defensive option
  • Active frames of a normal Throw are extended when they make contact with throw invuln prejump frames, ensuring a jump canceled special will be thrown immediately
  • This is especially impactful for Zangief and Lily, who have a longer prejump time that could be canceled into a command throw

Perfect Parry vs. Multi-hit Attacks
  • After a Perfect Parry, it is no longer possible to cancel the later hits of an attack
  • This was already true on block, but now applies on hit and armor as well
  • This change allows characters to punish more attacks with Drive Impact, such as M. Bison's OD Psycho Crusher and Lily's Windclad OD Condor Spire

    • Note: this change was temporarily reverted due to a bug, but was re-applied in Version 1.09

items.text: Super Armor Fixed issue where an attack could be absorbed by armor even when connecting with a non-armored hurtbox, if it connected during the hitstop of another attack that was armor absorbed Hypothetical example: Marisa absorbs a projectile with Gladius (upper-body armor), then a 2MK connects immediately afterward during the armor hitstop, leading to it being absorbed when it should go under the armor hurtbox
items.html:
Super Armor
  • Fixed issue where an attack could be absorbed by armor even when connecting with a non-armored hurtbox, if it connected during the hitstop of another attack that was armor absorbed
  • Hypothetical example: Marisa absorbs a projectile with Gladius (upper-body armor), then a 2MK connects immediately afterward during the armor hitstop, leading to it being absorbed when it should go under the armor hurtbox

  • All medium normals can now combo into both versions naturally

  • Reduced pushback on hit

items.text: 5HP Block Recovery decreased 18 → 16 Block Advantage increased -1 → +1 (no change to DR Cancel data) When the Drive Rush version is blocked, Terry can microwalk + throw to beat 4f normals Increased input buffer on hit by 2f to make follow-ups easier
items.html:
5HP
  • Block Recovery decreased 18 → 16
  • Block Advantage increased -1 → +1 (no change to DR Cancel data)
  • When the Drive Rush version is blocked, Terry can microwalk + throw to beat 4f normals
  • Increased input buffer on hit by 2f to make follow-ups easier

items.text: 2HK Hitbox connects lower on grounded opponents, preventing upper-body armor from absorbing it
items.html:
2HK
  • Hitbox connects lower on grounded opponents, preventing upper-body armor from absorbing it

items.html:
MP Power Wave (236MP)
  • Hurtbox expansion starts 2f later (16f → 18f), making it harder to counterpoke in neutral

items.text: HP Round Wave (236HP) Recovery reduced 16 → 14 Total animation reduced 53 → 51 Hitstun decreased 33 → 31 Blockstun decreased 30 → 28 Perfect Parry Advantage increased -23 → -21 (Hit/Block Advantage unchanged) Drive Damage on Block increased 5000 → 7000 These changes give Terry an extra 2 frames for follow-up juggles on airborne opponents, and the blockstring gap is no longer punishable by Drive Impact when canceled from 5HP/2HP or DR~5MP/2MP/2MK
items.html:
HP Round Wave (236HP)
  • Recovery reduced 16 → 14
  • Total animation reduced 53 → 51
  • Hitstun decreased 33 → 31
  • Blockstun decreased 30 → 28
  • Perfect Parry Advantage increased -23 → -21 (Hit/Block Advantage unchanged)
  • Drive Damage on Block increased 5000 → 7000
  • These changes give Terry an extra 2 frames for follow-up juggles on airborne opponents, and the blockstring gap is no longer punishable by Drive Impact when canceled from 5HP/2HP or DR~5MP/2MP/2MK

items.text: LK Power Charge (236LK) Reduced forward hitbox of 1st active frame Allows meaty mid-combo hit despite 2MP pushback reduction

  • Allows meaty mid-combo hit despite 2MP pushback reduction

items.text: MK Crack Shoot (214MK) Hitstun increased 21 → 23 Hit Advantage increased +1 → +3 Grounded Counter-hit changed to a Hard Knockdown (HKD +28, identical to Punish Counter) Fixed issue where hitstun was longer than intended when the 5th active frame connected on a grounded opponent Drive Damage on Block increased 2500 → 3500
items.html:
MK Crack Shoot (214MK)
  • Hitstun increased 21 → 23
  • Hit Advantage increased +1 → +3
  • Grounded Counter-hit changed to a Hard Knockdown (HKD +28, identical to Punish Counter)
  • Fixed issue where hitstun was longer than intended when the 5th active frame connected on a grounded opponent
  • Drive Damage on Block increased 2500 → 3500
